description: JBUJB tool registry — OpenAI function-calling format with evaluation metadata. Source of truth for tool validity, argument schemas, and safety rules during fine-tuning and evaluation.

function.name: search_context
function.description: Broad discovery tool for ambiguous food requests. Embed the query, search menu items, merchants, and campaigns in parallel, then follow exact IDs into detail or order tools.

query.description: Free-text food or restaurant concept from user.

language.description: ISO language code (fr, en, ar). Default: fr.

lat.description: User latitude for geo-scoping, from session context.

lon.description: User longitude for geo-scoping, from session context.

function.name: search_food
function.description: Search for specific dishes by name or concept (e.g. 'tacos poulet', 'sushi pas cher'). Returns matching dishes with prices and restaurant info. Do NOT use for listing a full restaurant menu — use get_restaurant_menu instead.

query.description: What the user wants to eat.

business_id.description: Optional: narrow to one merchant. Must come from resolve_restaurant or search_restaurants output.

product_type.description: Optional: filter by category (e.g. dessert, boisson).

function.name: search_restaurants
function.description: Search for restaurants by cuisine, location, budget, opening status. Returns restaurant list with ratings. Do NOT use for resolving a named restaurant — use resolve_restaurant instead.

query.description: Cuisine type or restaurant name from user.

lat.description: Latitude (from session or user). Required unless city context exists.

lon.description: Longitude (from session or user). Required unless city context exists.

function.name: resolve_restaurant
function.description: MANDATORY FIRST STEP for menu/details queries. Resolve a free-form restaurant name to exact business_id. Use its output as input to get_restaurant_menu or get_restaurant_details. Do NOT guess IDs — always resolve the name first.

name.description: Raw restaurant name from user utterance.

city.description: Optional city hint to disambiguate (from user or session).

lat.description: Latitude for geo-scoping, from session context.

lon.description: Longitude for geo-scoping, from session context.

function.name: search_all
function.description: Unified search across dishes AND restaurants. Use when the query spans both (e.g. 'tacos near me' or 'good Italian food'). Returns grouped results by type.

function.name: get_promotions
function.description: Get active promotions and deals. Optionally filter by merchant or search text. Returns discount value and type.

merchant_id.description: Optional: filter by merchant. Must come from resolve_restaurant or search_restaurants output. Alias: business_id.

function.name: find_nearby
function.description: Find restaurants near a geographic location (lat/lon). Use when user asks for 'near me' or gives GPS coordinates. Returns restaurants sorted by distance.

function.name: get_product
function.description: Get raw product details by exact product_id. Use for quick lookups. Use ONLY with IDs from search_food, search_all, or get_restaurant_menu. Do NOT guess IDs.

product_id.description: Exact product ID from a prior search or menu result.

function.name: get_food_details
function.description: Complete dish details: price, allergens, ingredients, restaurant info, image, active promotions. Use ONLY with exact product_id from search results. Do NOT guess IDs.

product_id.description: Exact product ID from search_food, search_all, or get_restaurant_menu result.

function.name: get_merchant
function.description: Get basic merchant details by exact business_id. Use ONLY with IDs from search_restaurants, resolve_restaurant, or find_nearby. Do NOT guess IDs.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant or search_restaurants result.

function.name: get_merchant_hours
function.description: Get business hours for a merchant by exact business_id.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant output.

function.name: get_restaurant_details
function.description: Complete restaurant profile: name, rating, address, hours, cuisine, delivery info. Use ONLY with exact business_id from resolve_restaurant or search_restaurants. Do NOT guess IDs.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant output.

function.name: get_restaurant_menu
function.description: Full restaurant menu. Use AFTER resolve_restaurant. Returns all products for a business_id with search, pagination, and category filters. Only call with an ID from resolve_restaurant output.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant output.

search.description: Optional: text filter within the menu.

function.name: check_restaurant_open
function.description: Check if a restaurant is currently open and return today's hours. Use with exact business_id from resolve_restaurant output.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant output.

function.name: check_food_available
function.description: Check if a product is currently orderable from a restaurant. Use with exact product_id from search results and optional business_id.

product_id.description: Exact product ID from search_food or get_restaurant_menu result.

merchant_id.description: Optional business ID to narrow the check.

function.name: get_delivery_info
function.description: Get delivery zones, estimated time, minimum order, and fees for a restaurant. Use with exact business_id from resolve_restaurant output.

merchant_id.description: Exact business ID from resolve_restaurant output.

function.name: validate_products
function.description: Bulk validate a list of product IDs against the catalog. Returns which IDs are valid and which are not found. Use before creating an order to ensure all product IDs are correct.

product_ids.description: Array of product IDs to validate. Must come from get_restaurant_menu or search_food results.

function.name: create_order
function.description: Create a new order draft. Provide restaurant name and items with product_id and quantity. ALWAYS ask user for explicit confirmation before calling this tool. Internal IDs are resolved automatically.

items.description: Items to add to the draft order. Each item must have product_id and quantity.

product_id.description: Product ID from search_food, get_restaurant_menu, or validate_products output.

restaurant.description: Restaurant name for display. Resolved automatically.

function.name: add_to_order
function.description: Add items to an existing order draft by draft_id. ALWAYS ask user for explicit confirmation before calling this tool.

draft_id.description: Draft ID from a prior create_order call.

items.description: Items to add. Each item must have product_id and quantity.

product_id.description: Product ID from search or menu result.

function.name: remove_from_order
function.description: Remove items from an order draft by product_id. ALWAYS ask user for explicit confirmation before calling this tool.

draft_id.description: Draft ID from a prior create_order call.

product_ids.description: Product IDs to remove. Must come from get_order items.

function.name: get_order
function.description: View the current order draft with all items, quantities, and totals by draft_id. Does NOT modify the order.

draft_id.description: Draft ID from a prior create_order call or from session context.

function.name: get_user_profile
function.description: Get the current user's profile: name, email, phone. Use when personalizing recommendations or confirming identity.

user_id.description: User ID injected by system. Do NOT guess or prompt user for this.

function.name: help
function.description: List all available tools and their purpose. Use only when the user explicitly asks what you can do.

DISCOVERY.description: Broad exploration and name-to-ID resolution. Search dishes, restaurants, promos. No mutations.

DETAILS.description: Deep-dive into a specific merchant or product. Requires resolved IDs from DISCOVERY tools.

ORDERING.description: Shopping-cart lifecycle. Mutating tools (create, add, remove) REQUIRE explicit user confirmation.

confirmation_required.description: For tools with requires_confirmation=true, the model MUST ask for and receive explicit user confirmation before the tool call appears.

id_provenance_required.description: For tools with forbidden_without containing product_id/business_id, the ID MUST appear in a prior tool output or user utterance. Invented IDs are a critical error.

tool_ordering.description: resolved tool calls (those producing IDs) must precede detail/ordering tools consuming those IDs.

no_dangerous_tools.description: The following tools are dangerous (DELETE, PATCH/status) and must NEVER appear in model output. Any call to these is a critical failure.
